title: Round Logs - Heycronus
description: Makes tree logs slightly rounder for a more natural Vanilla+ look.
body:
![Round Logs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/687287cd0ea1eaa72658856fc4ce209a6d9f155d_0.webp)

Round Logs is a texture pack that slightly reshapes Minecraft tree logs, making them look more circular instead of completely square.
The goal is to provide a more natural and organic appearance while keeping the original vanilla style of the game.

The changes are subtle but make a noticeable difference in forests, wooden builds, and decorative structures. Everything works perfectly without any additional mods and does not require OptiFine, ensuring full compatibility with the default Minecraft experience.

This pack is ideal for players looking for a Vanilla+ feel, adding extra visual smoothness and realism without changing the core identity of the game.
